home.descripcionHome: We guide every student with clear vocational counseling, personalized recommendations, and AI-powered tools to make confident decisions.
home.estudiantesEncontraron: students already found a better direction.
home.testVocacionalDesc: Discover your interests, strengths, and areas of affinity.
home.explorarCarrerasDesc: Compare options, fields of study, and career paths.
home.mentorIADesc: Get instant answers with intelligent guidance.
home.planPersonalizadoDesc: Receive clear recommendations based on your profile and goals.
home.simularCarreraDesc: Experience a day in different professions with interactive mini-games.
home.comunidadDesc: Connect with other students and share your career experience.
home.mentorDesc: Get instant answers with intelligent, personalized guidance.
home.recursosDesc: Admission guides, planning tools, and more useful resources.

login.bienvenido: Welcome to the most dynamic career hub
login.descripcionLogin: A modern login with the system's colors and energy. Your journey to UTP starts here with mentoring, resources, and admissions.
login.contrasenaMinima: Password must be at least 6 characters

test.respondeRapido: Answer quickly — speed earns bonus points.
test.respuestasConfidenciales: Your answers are confidential and only used for your career profile.
test.cosmeticoDesbloqueado: Your avatar received a cosmetic item

carreras.explorarCarreras: Explore all the careers available at the Universidad Tecnológica del Perú. Click on any career to see what your professional life would be like today.
carreras.activarSimulador: 👆 Click on any career to activate the simulator
carreras.seleccionarComparar: ⚡ Select 2–3 careers to compare side by side

mentor.tuMentorTeDara: Your mentor will welcome you. Respond naturally as if it were a real interview.
mentor.noSePudoConectar: Could not connect to the mentor
mentor.verificaBackend: Verify that the backend is running and try again.
mentor.confirmarLimpiar: All conversation history will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
mentor.descripcionMentor: Practice real interviews with an AI mentor that adapts to your career. Receive personalized feedback and improve your confidence.
mentor.feedbackRealDesc: Receive detailed evaluation of each answer
mentor.preguntasRealesDesc: Based on real interviews from companies and universities
mentor.mejoraContinuaDesc: Practice as many times as you want without pressure
mentor.errorServidor: The server responded with an error. Verify that the backend is active.
mentor.respuestaInvalida: The mentor did not return a valid response.
mentor.errorDesconocido: Unknown error connecting to the mentor.
mentor.errorServidorSimple: The server responded with an error.

comunidad.queQuieresCompartir: What do you want to share with the community?
comunidad.comparteExperiencias: Share experiences, advice, and moments with students from all careers.

perfil.infoCuenta: Here you'll find all the information about your account and admission process.
perfil.sinInteresesEdicion: You haven't added any interests yet. Start typing above!
perfil.seleccionaCarrera: Select the career you're interested in to unlock skill analysis.
perfil.etapaActual: You are currently at this stage.
perfil.sinAvance: Your admission process progress hasn't been recorded yet.
perfil.consejo1: 1. Check your email for admission process information.
perfil.consejo2: 2. Complete your profile if you have more data available.
perfil.consejo3: 3. Use the Resources menu to explore careers and UTP admission.
perfil.cuentaRegistrada: Your account is registered and you've logged in successfully.
perfil.accion1: • Access the admission menu to find requirements.
perfil.accion2: • View your resources and recommended careers.
perfil.accion3: • Log out if using a shared device.
perfil.proximamenteDesc: Profile data editing, account photo, and notifications about your admission process.
perfil.errorAnalisis: An error occurred while analyzing careers. Please try again.
perfil.sinInteresesVista: You don't have any registered interests yet.

simular.diferentesProfesiones: Experience a day in different professions with interactive mini-games.
